PANEL SCHEDULE

What we run on the job

Three circuits, one crew — from bare slab to final trim-out.

CKT 01

Ground-Up Construction

Full electrical build-out for new commercial construction — rough-in, panel and service installation, and coordination with the rest of the trades from foundation to occupancy.

CKT 02

Remodels & Tenant Finish-Out

Electrical upgrades and reconfigurations for renovations and tenant improvements — updated circuits, fixtures, and panels that meet current code without disrupting an active building.

CKT 03

Service & Repair Calls

Diagnostics and repair for existing commercial electrical systems — panel issues, circuit failures, and code corrections handled by the same crew that does the new-build work.

ABOUT THE FOUNDER

Built on the trade, not just the business

4Tec-Electric provides industrial, commercial, and residential electrical services — from new ground-up construction to complete remodels — across Fort Worth and the surrounding DFW area.

Our founder got his start in a small town in South Texas, entering the electrical trade in 1999. He founded 4Tec-Electric in 2016, and the company has since completed projects ranging from 500,000 to 900,000 square feet.

No job is too small or too big.
